text:
ふぅ、終わったぁ～……
やっぱりハンターって疲れるわね。

……い、今のは別に弱音じゃなくて
率直な感想だからね。

ゼノの代わりになるにはまだまだだけど
きみに特訓をお願いしたのは
正解だったかな。

……うん。今のも率直な感想。
じゃ、帰還しよっか。

Phew, well that's that, finally... Hunters
really have it rough, huh?

N-Not to whine or anything, of course!
Just, you know, an observation.

I'm no Zeno yet, for sure, but coming out here
and training with you was probably the right
move.

Again, not a complaint, just an observation.
Why don't we head on back, now?
